action.reasoning: Observation: Current best hidden AUC is ~0.7680 from GRU/LSTM ensembling; PFA is not promising, and previous inspection indicates neural validation AUC may not correlate perfectly with hidden test for combined-data models. Analysis: A causal self-attention/SAKT-style model is architecturally different from recurrent DKT and may add complementary signal, but time is limited. Decision: implement a compact SAKT model and a validation-split trainer for a 3-seed ensemble, smoke-test prediction compatibility, and submit if training completes.
action.command: python train_sakt_val.py --epochs 12 --seeds 101,202,303 --batch_size 128 --d_model 256 --num_layers 2 --dropout 0.25 --out checkpoints/sakt_val_ensemble.pt && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/sakt_val_ensemble.pt --output smoke_predictions_sakt.json --batch_size 256
